settings.title: Settings

upcoming.title: Upcoming Updates
upcoming.subtitle: What's Coming Next
upcoming.downloadDesc: Download latest and previous versions of Baki Khata from GitHub.
upcoming.requestSubtitle: Have an idea to make Baki Khata better? Let us know!
upcoming.successMsg: Your feature request has been sent to our team. We'll review it soon!
upcoming.errorMail: Email app is not available on this device. Please email us directly at {{email}}

unifiedSync.title: Unified Ledger & Cloud Sync
unifiedSync.desc: A major update featuring QR-based ledger sharing between shopkeepers and customers, multi-device cloud backup, and advanced business profile management.

reminders.title: Smart Reminders & Notifications
reminders.desc: Shopkeepers can send automated or manual payment reminders to customers via Push Notifications and SMS.

multiShop.title: Multi-Shop Management
multiShop.desc: Manage multiple businesses and shops within the same profile with independent stats and reports.

tutorial.doneDesc: You now know the basics of Baki Khata. Ready to manage your accounts?
tutorial.settingsNote: Note: You can watch this tutorial again anytime from Settings.

addShop.title: Add Your First Shop
addShop.desc: Tap the '+' button to add a shop and start tracking your accounts.

shopDetails.title: Shop Overview
shopDetails.desc: See your total due to this shop at a glance and track your history.

quickEntry.title: Add Payment
quickEntry.desc: Whenever you pay money back to the shop, tap 'Add Payment' to record it.

manageProducts.title: Manage Products
manageProducts.desc: Setup products you buy from this shop to record entries even faster.

addProduct.title: Add New Product
addProduct.desc: Tap '+' to add a product with its name and default price.

deleteProduct.title: Remove Product
deleteProduct.desc: Swipe left on any product to remove it from your list.

recordPurchase.title: Record a Purchase
recordPurchase.desc: Simply tap on any product you bought to record a new baki entry.

restartLocation.title: Tutorial Location
restartLocation.desc: You can restart this tutorial anytime from the Settings menu here.

swipeActions.title: Quick Contact
swipeActions.desc: Swipe from left to right on any shop to quickly Call or message them on WhatsApp.

paymentPresets.title: Fast Payments
paymentPresets.desc: Use the preset amount buttons (50, 100, 200, 500) to record payments even faster.

quantityControls.title: Easy Quantity
quantityControls.desc: Use the plus and minus buttons to quickly adjust the quantity of products.

addCustomer.title: Add Your First Customer
addCustomer.desc: Tap the '+' button to add a customer and start tracking their baki.

customerDetails.title: Customer Overview
customerDetails.desc: See how much this customer owes you and track their payment history.

recordSale.title: Record a Sale
recordSale.desc: Simply tap on any product they bought to record a new baki entry.

addPayment.title: Record Payment
addPayment.desc: Whenever a customer pays you back, tap 'Record Payment' to update their balance.

auth.personalProfileDesc: Track your own expenses and dues
auth.guestDataSyncMsg: You have offline guest data. Do you want to merge it with your account?

auth.deletePersonalProfileMsg: This will permanently delete your Personal profile and all its data. Your Business profile will remain.
auth.guestProfileLockedMsg: Guest users are limited to one profile choice. Sign up to access both profiles!
auth.loginRequiredMsg: This feature is only available for registered users. Would you like to login now?
auth.customerLimitMsg: Guest users can add up to 5 customers. Login to add unlimited customers!
auth.productLimitMsg: Guest users can add up to 10 products. Login to add unlimited products!
auth.shopLimitMsg: Guest users can manage only 1 shop. Login to add unlimited shops!

shopkeeper.noStarred: No starred customers yet. Add them from the customers list.
